<!-- What does this PR do? Briefly describe the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] style: Formatting, missing semicolons, etc.
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore: Build process, dependencies, CI changes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (Pint PSR-12)
- [ ] I have run `./vendor/bin/pint` and committed formatted code
- [ ] PHPStan passes at Level 5 (`./vendor/bin/phpstan analyse`)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`php artisan test`)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: add poll filtering`)
- [ ] I have not committed any debug statements (`dd()`, `dump()`, `var_dump()`)
